__fixture__.name: evidence_only_sync_non_reentrant
__fixture__.scenario: A synced package is opened where the only surface that mattered was a non-reentrant live shell. The shell cannot resume safely, so the restore is Evidence only: the terminal transcript stays as retained evidence behind a placeholder, and the command is never rerun without explicit user action.
doc_sections: UI/UX Spec 6.10 Session restore and crash-loop handling
UI/UX Spec 6.14 Workspace serialization, portable-state packages, and restore provenance

missing_surface_placeholders.notes: Terminal transcript stayed as evidence; the command was not rerun and the PTY was not resumed.

notes: Evidence only. A non-reentrant live shell was retained as transcript evidence behind a placeholder; nothing was rerun and live authority stays excluded.
